title: Easy Displays
description: Create easy Item and Block Displays!
body:
# Unleash your inner decorator!
### **The limit is your imagination!**
> This datapack lets you transform everyday items and blocks into stunning decorations. Display your treasures, create unique furniture, or craft incredible scenes.


# Commands
**To get a help book ingame use** ```/trigger EasyDisplaysHelp```

**To uninstall this datapack use** ```/function ed:uninstall```

# Usage
## **Creating Displays**
1. Place an armor stand where you want your display to be.
2. Give the armor stand the corresponding name for each display with a Name Tag.

Tags:
> "**Item Display**" / "**Block Display**" (without the "")

- **(Dont break the Armor Stand untill you finish configuring it)**

## **Settings**
To change the settings of our display we need to add tags to it. We do this by throwing a Name Tag with the tag we want on top of the display.

### **Size**
Tags:
> **"LARGE" / "SMALL"**

### **Rotation**
Tags:
> **"ROTATER"** (rotates right) / **"ROTATEL**" (rotates left) / **"ROTATEZR"** (rotates right in the Z axis) / **"ROTATEZL**" (rotates left in the Z axis)

### **Speed**
Tags:
> **"SLOW"** / **"NORMAL"** / **"FAST"** / **"RANDOMR"** (to the right)/ **"RANDOML"** (to the left)

(you can combine random with the other speeds)

### **Stop**
Tags:
> **"STOP"** (this will stop all movements of the display)

### **Delete**
> **"DELETE"** / **"DELETEALL"** (careful with this one)

### **Direction**
Only for Block Displays
Tags:
> **"UP"** / **"DOWN"** / **"NORTH"** / **"EAST"** / **"SOUTH"** / **"WEST"**

## **Bonus!**
This is a bonus feature. You can now make item frames invisible!
Tags:
> **INVISIBLE**
